characters.name: JUSS JÄNES
characters.description: Suur valge jänes pikkade roosade kõrvadega, kandmas väikest sinist vesti, alati sõbralik ja naeratav. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: TIIU HIIR
characters.description: Väike hall hiir suurte ümarate kõrvadega, kandmas väikest punast kleiti, suurte uudishimulike silmade ja rõõmsa näoilmega. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Käsitöötoa Nurgake
locations.description: Cozy children's craft area with yellow walls, light wooden floor. A small wooden table in the center with two small chairs. A simple wooden shelf with various craft supplies (like string, small pieces of wood, glue bottles, empty recycled containers) on the back wall. A single window on the back wall showing a sunny spring day with green grass and a tree branch. Warm, bright lighting. Cartoon style.

locations.name: Päikeseline Kevadaed
locations.description: Sunny backyard garden with lush green grass. A few trees with fresh green leaves. Some colorful spring flowers (like tulips or daffodils) blooming in a small patch near a wooden fence in the background. Clear blue sky. Bright and cheerful atmosphere. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are sitting side-by-side at a small wooden table inside a cozy children's craft area. Juss is looking out the window with wide, curious eyes. Tiiu is pointing towards the window with a happy smile. Through the window, a sunny spring garden with small, colorful cartoon birds flying can be seen. The room has yellow walls, a light wooden floor, and a simple wooden shelf with craft supplies on the back wall.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are still sitting at the small wooden table in the cozy children's craft area. They are looking at each other with bright, excited smiles, as if sharing a secret or a new idea. Juss has his paw gently on the table. Tiiu has one paw raised slightly, indicating a thought. The room has yellow walls, a light wooden floor, and a simple wooden shelf with craft supplies on the back wall. A sunny spring garden is visible through the window.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are standing next to the simple wooden shelf with craft supplies in the cozy children's craft area. Juss is carefully holding a small wooden board in his paws. Tiiu is reaching for a small, empty milk carton or similar recyclable container from the shelf. Various small craft items like string, small pieces of wood, and glue bottles are visible on the shelf. The room has yellow walls and a light wooden floor. A sunny spring garden is visible through the window.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are sitting at the small wooden table in the cozy children's craft area. They are actively engaged in building a bird feeder. Juss is carefully holding a small wooden piece. Tiiu is applying a small amount of white craft 'glue' from a tube to another piece of wood, which is part of the bird feeder structure. Simple, partially assembled bird feeder components (made from recycled materials like a carton and small wooden perches) are on the table. The room has yellow walls, a light wooden floor, and a simple wooden shelf with craft supplies on the back wall. A sunny spring garden is visible through the window.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are proudly looking at the nearly finished bird feeder, which is now sitting on the small wooden table in the cozy children's craft area. The bird feeder is a simple structure made from recycled materials, perhaps a small carton with a perch. Juss has a big, proud smile. Tiiu is nodding in satisfaction. The room has yellow walls, a light wooden floor, and a simple wooden shelf with craft supplies on the back wall. A sunny spring garden is visible through the window.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are outside in a sunny spring garden, standing next to a small wooden stool or on the lush green grass. They are carefully filling the newly built bird feeder with bird seeds. Juss is holding a small, open bag of bird seeds. Tiiu is gently pouring seeds from the bag into the feeder. The bird feeder is simple and made from recycled materials. Lush green grass, a few trees with fresh green leaves, and colorful spring flowers are visible in the background.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are in the sunny spring garden. Juss, being taller, is carefully reaching up to hang the bird feeder from a branch of a tree with fresh green leaves. Tiiu is standing next to Juss, looking up at the bird feeder with an eager smile, offering support or advice. The bird feeder is now hanging from the tree branch. Lush green grass and colorful spring flowers are visible.

The newly hung bird feeder is in the sunny spring garden, with several small, colorful cartoon birds happily perched on it and eating seeds. Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are watching from a little distance, hidden slightly behind a bush or tree trunk, smiling excitedly. Lush green grass, trees with fresh green leaves, and colorful spring flowers are visible around them.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are sitting together on the lush green grass in the sunny spring garden, looking at the bird feeder in the tree (which still has birds on it, eating). They are both smiling broadly and have joyful expressions, perhaps high-fiving each other with a gentle tap or just looking at each other happily. Trees with fresh green leaves and colorful spring flowers are visible in the background.

Juss Jänes and Tiiu Hiir are still sitting on the lush green grass in the sunny spring garden, looking contentedly at the bird feeder and the birds. They are holding paws or have their arms around each other in a friendly, gentle hug, full of warmth and happiness. A clear blue sky above. Trees with fresh green leaves and colorful spring flowers are visible in the background.
